subject: Zephyrous -> Pearly: PR 108 duplication triage report
body: Read-only PR 108 duplication triage complete. Sonar state: quality gate ERROR; new_duplicated_lines_density is 5.9 percent over threshold 3; new_violations also ERROR at 20. search_duplicated_files returns 54 duplicated files. Main finding: the raw duplicate list is dominated by paths already covered by repo policy and sonar-project.properties cpd exclusions: generated SDK output under packages/sdks/oak-sdk-codegen/src/types/generated/**, test/e2e files, and agent-tools/src/bin/**. Top generated examples: api-schema-base.ts 7283 duplicated lines, api-paths-types.ts 2695, path-parameters.ts 2353, curriculumZodSchemas.ts 1618, response-map.ts 1444. Smallest gate-recovery path is first to verify why current Sonar analysis is still counting policy-excluded CPD paths, or rerun after the current sonar-project.properties is included in the analysed commit. Do not hand-edit generated files or DRY tests to appease CPD; existing policy says those are denominator-scope exclusions, not source refactor targets. Practical source/test refactor queue if CPD config is already confirmed applied: 1. Extract shared resolveSelfIdentity from cli-comms-watch.ts and cli-comms-inbox.ts, removing the 26-32 line duplicate block. 2. Extract common sync/async phase instrumentation core from apps/oak-curriculum-mcp-streamable-http/src/app/bootstrap-helpers.ts, removing two 21-line duplicate blocks. 3. Extract shared event projection helpers in agent-tools/src/collaboration-state/state-schemas.ts, where narrative/lifecycle projections duplicate parse helpers. 4. Extract shared spawn-process helper for agent-tools/src/commit-queue/commit-workflow-runtime.ts and agent-tools/scripts/check-commit-skill-advisories.ts. Lower priority/config/test-only duplicates: knip.config.ts self-duplicate, design eslint configs, oak-eslint boundary tests, and TUI tests. My verdict: do CPD-exclusion analysis/reanalysis first; only then open implementation claims for the four small source refactors if the gate remains above 3 percent. No source claim, no edits, no staging.
